nodes.name: 奥里诺科河
nodes.summary: 奥里诺科河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Spix's guan、红隐蜂鸟、啸鹭等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Black-striped sparrow
nodes.summary: Black-striped sparrow（Black-striped sparrow，学名 Arremonops conirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于次生林、奥里诺科河。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: striaticeps is found in the rest of Panama and in Colombia and Ecuador as above. In most of its range the black-striped sparrow inhabits a variety of low-stature landscapes including young secondary forest, the edges of humid woodlands, fields and pastures with shrubs and thickets, and shady plantations and gardens

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: pastazae inhabits river sandbars with dense stands of Tessaria integrifolia. In elevation it is found from sea level to in Honduras, to in Costa Rica, to in Colombia, to in Ecuador, to north of the Orinoco River in Venezuela, and to south of it
